commands.title: /summon
commands.description: Spawns mobs, items, projectiles, or other entities.
commands.breakdown: entity = entity type ID (e.g., zombie, arrow). pos is optional.

commands.title: /damage
commands.description: Damages entities directly with a specific amount and optional damage type.
commands.breakdown: type can define source like fire, falling, or magic for themed damage effects.

commands.title: /event
commands.description: Triggers a specific entity event (behavior state).
commands.breakdown: Useful for forcing mob reactions like scaling, transformations, or state changes.

commands.title: /tag
commands.description: Adds, removes, or lists strings tags on entities.
commands.breakdown: Tags are invisible markers used to track specific entities in complex command systems.

commands.title: /ride
commands.description: Makes entities ride each other or dismount.
commands.breakdown: start_riding requires a vehicle entity. evict_riders clears all passengers from a mount.

commands.title: /playanimation
commands.description: Plays a specific animation on one or more entities.
commands.breakdown: animation must be a valid animation name from the entity's behavior/resource files.

commands.title: /mobevent
commands.description: Controls global mob event states (like wandering trader spawns).

commands.title: /dialogue
commands.description: Opens or changes the NPC dialogue screen for a player.

commands.title: /replaceitem
commands.description: Replaces an item in an entity's inventory or equipment slot.
